name: No Cholesterol Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
2. Add the cocoa, sugar, lite or cholesterol-free mayonnaise, water, and vanilla to the dry ingredients.
3. Mix all ingredients on high speed with an electric mixer until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch pan (or two greased 8-inch layers).
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
NOTE: The teacher who submitted this recipe suggests baking in ice cream cones, microwaving each for 30 seconds, and topping with ice cream.
